name: Aquapark Fala
description: Large aquapark and recreation venue with indoor pools, outdoor summer zones, wellness, sauna, gastronomy and family attractions.
seasonality_profile: high summer peak, strong weekends and public holidays, winter indoor resilience
visitor_benchmark_notes: Calibrated from public benchmark assumptions: approximately 1.5M visitors in 2024 and more than 0.5M visitors during summer 2025. Exact daily attendance is not public.
data_quality_status: public benchmarks plus calibrated demo attendance

name: Orientarium Zoo Łódź
description: Zoo and Orientarium complex with outdoor animal areas, indoor Southeast Asia themed exhibits, education, gastronomy and family tourism appeal.
seasonality_profile: spring and summer tourism peak, strong weekends, public holidays and school trip effect, indoor resilience in poor weather
visitor_benchmark_notes: Calibrated from public benchmark assumptions: close to 1M visitors in 2024 and more than 200k visitors in August 2025. Exact daily attendance is not public.
data_quality_status: public benchmarks plus calibrated demo attendance
